factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Haunting
uniqueTraits.text: When Styx is knocked out, your opponent may not move him.

ultimate.name: The Reaping
ultimate.text: Knock out an enemy model within range. It does not award you any steps on the battle ladder.

plotSkills.name: Hour is Nigh
plotSkills.text: Styx may use this skill as a bonus action. An enemy model within range gains {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Dead Beckoning
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward Styx.

clashSkills.name: Apparition
clashSkills.text: Move one objective hex within range 1 hex toward Styx onto an empty non-objective hex. Models on the objective hex move with it.

traits.name: Drag
traits.text: At the end of the Abyssal Hounds' activation, move up to 2 small follower models within 2 hexes of an Abyssal Hound, 1 hex towards that Abyssal Hound.

plotSkills.name: Pack Hunters
plotSkills.text: Move each Abyssal Hound within 4 hexes of Styx up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Torn to Shreds
clashSkills.text: If both Abyssal Hounds are adjacent to the same enemy banner, remove the banner from the battlefield.

clashSkills.name: Triple Bite
clashSkills.text: Make 3 hit rolls instead of 1. For each hit, this skill has +2 {damage_die}.
